name: Chocolate Covered Easter Eggs
recipeIngredient: 5 Squares unsweetened chocolate, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a 3-quart saucepan over medium heat.
2. Stir in the pudding mix; blend until smooth.
3. Gradually stir in milk, cooking over medium heat while stirring constantly.
4. Continue cooking until the mixture is very thick and starts to boil.
5. Cook until the mixture leaves the sides of the pan. Remove from heat.
6. Stir in powdered sugar and vanilla extract until smooth.
7. Mix in chopped walnuts.
8. Cool the mixture until it is stiff enough to hold its shape.
9. Shape the mixture into 12 eggs using about 2 tablespoons for each.
10. Place on a wax paper-lined baking sheet and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
11. Dip each egg in cooled chocolate.
12. Place on a cooling rack over waxed paper.
13. If desired, decorate with marshmallow flowers: cut mini marshmallows into thirds crosswise, dip the cut side in colored sugar, and arrange 5 pieces on each egg to resemble flowers.
14. Store in the refrigerator.
